info.title: InsightFlow Public API
info.description: Public API for InsightFlow platform. All endpoints support authentication via API key (`X-API-Key` header) or Bearer JWT token. API keys provide full organization-level access.

get.summary: Get processing job details with runs

post.summary: Retry failed/queued runs in a job
Submit manual evaluation for a run
Reprocess a run (create new run from existing)

patch.summary: Update speaker labels for a run

get.summary: Get all processing runs for a file

patch.summary: Update evaluation answers and recalculate scores
Exclude or re-include evaluation from analytics

excluded.description: true to exclude, false to re-include

get.summary: Browse files and folders at a path

post.summary: Test a new connection before creating

get.summary: Get file processing details for sync log
Get all versions of a questionnaire
Agent AI profile with competency scores

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Organization-scoped API key. Format: `ak_XXXXXXXX_XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX` (44 characters total)

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token from login endpoint

AnalyticsFilters.name: projectId
AnalyticsFilters.description: Also supports: servicePartnerId, teamId, campaignId, questionnaireId, evaluationType as query params
